port_metadata.vessel_dimension_source: International Tonnage Conventions (including legally established corrections)
port_metadata.billing_basis: Tariffs are established per maneuver (berthing, unberthing, shifting), regardless of the number of tugboats used.

hourly_rates_and_special_services.description: Services other than berthing, unberthing, or shifting maneuvers, including availability services.

relevant_subtext_and_rules.language_precedence: Drawn up in Spanish by the Port Authority of Valencia and translated into English. In the event of disputes, the Official Spanish text published on the official website of the Port Authority takes precedence.
